steps.title: Start with the daily range
steps.content:
The model says the whale travels from $68$ to $73$ miles each day. Let $d$ be the daily miles:
$$68\le d\le73$$

steps.title: Scale by fourteen days
steps.content:
The total number of miles for $14$ days is $14d$, so multiply every part of the inequality by $14$:
$$68(14)\le x\le73(14)$$
The answer is B.
